hackathon: Build with DataHub: The Agent Hackathon
invariants: No Devpost submission action occurs while submission_authorized is false.
The final video must be public and shorter than three minutes.
The hosted Replay must remain explicitly labeled as non-live.
Benchmark claims must remain scoped to the declared deterministic corpus.
Agent Registry evidence must remain labeled preview/development channel.
The Agent Skill must not be described as upstream-merged unless an upstream merge actually occurs.
No Rayluno code, assets, infrastructure, branding, or submission content may appear.
